name: agent-reflexion-mcp
description: Agent self-improvement and reflection MCP server. Agents log decisions and outcomes, analyze performance patterns, get actionable improvement suggestions, track metrics, and set goals — creating a continuous learning loop.

tools.name: log_decision
tools.description: Record a decision with context, reasoning, and expected outcome

tools.name: log_outcome
tools.description: Record the actual outcome of a previous decision

tools.name: analyze_patterns
tools.description: Analyze decision patterns — success rates, failure modes, confidence calibration

tools.name: get_suggestions
tools.description: Get specific improvement suggestions based on historical performance

tools.name: track_metric
tools.description: Track a named metric over time with automatic trend detection

tools.name: set_goal
tools.description: Set an improvement goal with target metric and deadline

tools.name: check_goals
tools.description: Check progress against active improvement goals
